narrative_text: On the wooden bridge, the bird pecks again and the balloon pops with a loud bang. The yellow pieces fall into the water below. The boy's face crumbles. He leans over the railing, watching the pieces drift away.
scene_description: The aftermath of the chase finds the boy tumbled onto the stone path while the balloon escapes toward a large fountain. A curious duck watches the golden balloon drift higher, while the spotted puppy sits nearby looking quite unsure of the trouble it caused. The scene is bright and filled with the sparkling blue water of the fountain reflecting the warm afternoon sun.

properties.distinctive_features: large round silver glasses and messy dark hair

entities.pose: sitting on the stone path with his legs splayed out and one hand reaching upward toward the sky

properties.color: creamy white with chocolate brown spots
properties.distinctive_features: a wagging tail and a bright turquoise collar

entities.pose: sitting on its haunches with its head tilted back and ears perked up

properties.distinctive_features: a long thin black string trailing in a loose loop

entities.pose: floating diagonally upward with the string hanging down like a long tail

properties.distinctive_features: a bright orange beak and dark bead-like eyes

entities.pose: perched on the edge of the granite fountain basin with its head tucked slightly forward

title: The Pop
